headline: Supreme Court Upholds TikTok Ban
summary: The Supreme Court ruled unanimously to uphold the law banning TikTok unless ByteDance divests, giving the app 90 days before enforcement.

reactions.quote: The Supreme Court has an established historical record of protecting Americans' right to free speech, and we expect they will do just that on this important constitutional issue. Unfortunately, the TikTok ban was conceived and pushed through based
